circulant_commutant_theorem.conclusion: The face carrier supplies the correct dimension and cyclic covariance, but C3 symmetry alone selects neither |b|/a nor delta. Distinct positive simple spectra obey exactly the same face symmetry.
circulant_commutant_theorem.statement: Every Hermitian operator on one face fiber that commutes with the regular C3 shift has the form C=aI+bR+conjugate(b)R^2. Its three eigenvalues are a+2|b|cos(delta+2*pi*k/3).

claim_boundary: The icosahedron is integral to OPH microphysics and the face-corner C3 carrier is a source-side local geometric lemma. The numerical formulas are conditional conjectures because the listed source maps are work in progress.

not_derived_by_face_incidence: the one-bit amplitude balance or its leakage correction
the kappa, chi_rho, and zeta_delta finite-incidence equalizers
identification with the on-shell pole-mass coordinate
validated_here: face stabilizer C3 and the three-corner cyclic carrier
face-ID independence of the unordered spectrum

if_supplied: an OPH quotient-visible attachment Xi from the face-corner bundle to the physical charged-generation multiplicity space
a source law fixing the Hermitian-circulant amplitude and phase
a declared running coordinate and RG/threshold/pole conversion
conditional_physical_completion_theorem.then: the simple fiber spectrum gives an ID-independent unordered charged triple; a further attachment relative to neutrino or other family observables fixes the physical family lines

face_orbit_theorem.fiber: the three corners of one outward-oriented triangular face
face_orbit_theorem.global_flag_boundary: The 20*3=60 face-corner flags form a free transitive A5 set, hence their linearization is the 60-dimensional regular A5 representation. They do not canonically collapse to one global three-dimensional family space. Selecting or trivializing a face fiber requires an additional quotient-visible section, connection, or physical intertwiner.
face_orbit_theorem.orientation_boundary: Reversing the fiber orientation exchanges R and R^2. A Hermitian circulant is complex-conjugated and retains the same unordered real spectrum.
face_orbit_theorem.statement: The declared icosahedral screen canonically carries a twenty-face A5/C3 orbit. The C3 stabilizer cyclically permutes the three corners of a face, giving an A5-associated bundle of local rank-three geometric fibers. Changing the face acts by A5 transport; no hidden face or port ID is required for the isomorphism class. For a fiber operator transported A5-equivariantly from one face, every face representative has the same conjugacy-invariant unordered spectrum.

relation_to_twelve_port_W5_theorem: The face-corner bundle is a valid alternative incidence carrier. It does not contradict the W5 no-go, which applies to linear moments of scalar weights on the twelve vertices. Incidence geometry can supply a geometric C3 fiber without a nonuniform port scalar, but requires a physical charged attachment and dynamical spectral value law.
